subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of God! Thy letter was received, and its contents were perused with the utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق خدا نامه شما رسید و بر مضامین کما هی حقها در نهایت دقت اطلاع
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
